verdict: EXHAUSTED. The 30 records of data/attributions.json yield 121 derivable provenance facts; the trained pack training/lora/train.jsonl already trains on 121 of them, covering all 121 derivable facts. FACT-DISJOINT (genuinely held-out) growth from this source = 0 items. The 91 prompt-level-clean candidates ALL test already-trained facts (memorization recall, identical in character to the existing 32-item held-out, whose 9/10 philosophy facts are also trained), so they cannot honestly grow a GENERALIZATION held-out. The held-out stays at N=32, CI +/-0.17, includes 0 -> still underpowered. 493 is unreachable from this source; even the lenient prompt-level max (N=123) gives CI +/-0.088, which still includes the +6.25pt effect.
